push 100 y              #  initialize outer counter
    # loop y

    push 10                 #
    out_char                #  newline
    push -200 x             #  initialize inner counter
        # loop x
        duplicate x_copy

        push 3
        push 2
        roll # dig up y
        duplicate y_copy
debug_stack
        push 3
        push 1
        roll

        push 4
        push 1
        roll

debug_stack
